analysis: You opened this stretch with a rough 5h 57m on 14 July, then absolutely bounced back with a 9h 22m night — which, yes, we are counting that as your body claiming what it was owed. The middle of the week landed solidly in that 7 to 8 hour zone, which is genuinely good work, and that 53 minutes of deep sleep on the 17th is the kind of number that makes your muscles quietly smug. The back end has gotten choppier though — awake time crept up to 49 minutes, then 51, then a full hour and 22 minutes last night, which is your body having a little too much to say at 3am. The stack you're running is good; the consistency of when you're actually getting into bed is probably the next thing worth eyeing.
